_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to add, subtract, multiply and divide algebraic fractions with simple denominators.

_source.w: We are learning to add, subtract, multiply and divide algebraic fractions with simple denominators.
y: Algebraic fractions extend our fraction skills to expressions with variables — a skill needed for solving rational equations and calculus.
Working with algebraic fractions develops precision and attention to detail in algebraic manipulation.
These operations appear in physics formulas, engineering equations and advanced mathematics.
eg: Adding with unlike denominators: 2/(x+1) + 3/(x–1), finding a common denominator.
